articles.title: ‘Obsession’ is a sensation. Everyone, including Curry Barker, is trying to figure out what it means - AP News

articles.title: American doctor who recovered from Ebola arrives back in U.S., says he's "feeling well" - CBS News
articles.description: Dr. Peter Stafford, his wife, Rebekah Stafford, and their four children all arrived safely on Monday, according to Serge, a Pennsylvania-based Christian missions organization.
